title: Working with magpiesets

title: summationhelper — summationhelper

title: summationhelper — summationhelper
text: x MAgPIE object validation calculations "almost" ready format. e.g. x <- calcOutput("ValidDemand","FAO") sep summation symbol (+,++,-) dim Dimension modification, take place check Switch turn checking routine, FALSE. Default TRUE. excludeLevels levels excluded summation, e.g. 1 Trade Trade|Net-Exports.

title: summationhelper — summationhelper
text: MAgPIE object

title: summationhelper — summationhelper
text: summationhelper help organize subcategories groups e.g. stackplots. Notice following hints: Every name just contain one summation symbol (mostly '+'). position symbol (counted '|' left side) determine level. Every subitem containing summation symbol level supercategory name summed. Items without summation symbol ge ignored. Items different summation symbols summed separately. cases summation symbol just placed last level (counted '|' left side). helpful think group items stacked stackplot. example summation symbol placement look like:
code: Toplevel   Toplevel|+|Item 1   Toplevel|+|Item 2   Toplevel|Item 2|+|Subitem 1   Toplevel|Item 2|+|Subitem 1   Toplevel|++|Item A   Toplevel|++|Item B   Toplevel|Item ?

title: summationhelper — summationhelper
text: Abhijeet Mishra, Kristine Karstens

title: summationhelper — summationhelper
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{     x <- calcOutput("LanduseInitialisation",aggregate = FALSE)     getNames(x) <- paste0("Land Cover|", reportingnames(getNames(x))," (million ha)")        x <- summationhelper(x)   } # }
